revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:方墳大塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|image=File:Hofun Otsuka Kofun.jpg|coordinates={{Coord|35.923694|N|139.582444|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}
[[File:Hofun Otsuka Kofun.jpg|thumb|250px|right|Full view]] {{Coord|35|55|25.3|N|139|34|56.8|E|region:JP|display=title}}
'''Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun''' (方墳大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (方墳) located in [[Miyamae-chō, Nishi Ward, Saitama City|Miyamae-chō]], [[Nishi Ward, Saitama|Nishi Ward]], [[:en:Saitama City|Saitama City]], {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}, Japan. It was designated as a Saitama Prefectural Historic Site in 1958 (Shōwa 33).
The tumulus measures 21×25 meters at the base, with a height of 4 meters.<ref>Hiroshi Shiono, *Kofun of Saitama: Kita-Adachi & Iruma* (Sakitama Publishing, 2004).</ref> Since it has not been excavated, details such as the presence of [[fukiishi]] (葺石, stone paving), {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|qid=Q849376|lt=Haniwa|1=Haniwa}} (埴輪), internal structure, and exact construction period remain unknown. It once formed part of the Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster, but all the surrounding small kofun have been destroyed.
{{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (方墳) are relatively rare in Saitama Prefecture, where most kofun are {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (円墳).<ref name=kensei>The *Saitama Kofun Detailed Distribution Survey Report* (1994) recorded 4,693 kofun in the prefecture, with 3,955 being circular kofun (84.3%) and only 101 being square kofun (2.2%).</ref>
== Change of Address == On November 17, 2017, due to Omiya West Special Land Readjustment Project, the land reallocation process was completed. As a result, on November 18, the kofun's address changed from Ōaza Sashiōgi (大字指扇) to Miyamae-chō (宮前町).<ref>{{Cite web|date=2018-09-21|url=https://www.city.saitama.jp/001/001/010/p034730.html|title=さいたま市／西区 大宮西部地区の町名地番変更について|website=Saitama City Official Website|accessdate=2018-12-12}}</ref>
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka_Kofun_(disambiguation)|8=ja|9=大塚古墳|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (disambiguation)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka_Kofun_(disambiguation)|qq=}} * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|qq=}} * [[List of Kofun in Japan]] * [[List of Kofun in Saitama Prefecture]] * {{ill|Enfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enfun Ōtsuka Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun大塚古墳|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11394747}}
